The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\Aluno\\Desktop\\clinica-vet\\.serviceRawFile:
service: vet-clinic-guilherme-inventory

frameworkVersion: "4"

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
  region: us-east-1
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  environment:
    PETS_TABLE: ${self:service}-pets-${self:provider.stage}
    TABLE_NAME: ${self:service}-inventory-${self:provider.stage}
    FRONTEND_BUCKET: ${self:service}-frontend-${self:provider.stage}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt PetsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt InventoryTable.Arn

functions:

  # -------------------------
  # PETS
  # -------------------------
  createPet:
    handler: src/pets/create.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /pets
          method: POST

  listPets:
    handler: src/pets/list.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /pets
          method: GET

  getPet:
    handler: src/pets/get.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /pets/{id}
          method: GET

  updatePet:
    handler: src/pets/update.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /pets/{id}
          method: PUT

  deletePet:
    handler: src/pets/delete.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /pets/{id}
          method: DELETE

  # -------------------------
  # INVENTORY
  # -------------------------
  inventoryCreate:
    handler: src/inventory/create.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory
          method: POST

  inventoryList:
    handler: src/inventory/list.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory
          method: GET

  inventoryGet:
    handler: src/inventory/get.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory/{id}
          method: GET

  inventoryUpdate:
    handler: src/inventory/update.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory/{id}
          method: PUT

  inventoryAdjust:
    handler: src/inventory/adjust.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory/{id}/adjust
          method: PATCH

  inventoryDelete:
    handler: src/inventory/delete.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /inventory/{id}
          method: DELETE

resources:
  Resources:

    PetsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:provider.environment.PETS_TABLE}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: id
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: id
            KeyType: HASH

    InventoryTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:provider.environment.TABLE_NAME}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: id
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: id
            KeyType: HASH

    FrontendBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:provider.environment.FRONTEND_BUCKET}
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: false
          BlockPublicPolicy: false
          IgnorePublicAcls: false
          RestrictPublicBuckets: false
        WebsiteConfiguration:
          IndexDocument: index.html

    FrontendBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: !Ref FrontendBucket
        PolicyDocument:
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action: s3:GetObject
              Resource: !Sub '${FrontendBucket.Arn}/*'

  Outputs:
    ApiUrl:
      Value: !Sub 'https://${HttpApi}.execute-api.${self:provider.region}.amazonaws.com'
    FrontendUrl:
      Value: !Sub 'http://${FrontendBucket}.s3-website-${self:provider.region}.amazonaws.com'

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
